text.title: Alert Noise Budget Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Alert Noise Budget methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: define-budget
step.decision-gate: Services without owner: split, do not budget.

step.name: instrument-actionable-flag
step.action: Add actionable y/n capture at ack time.
step.decision-gate: Events without flag: data-quality failure, fail review.

step.name: compute-weekly-status
step.action: Compute per-service status: within / at / over budget.

step.name: propose-tuning-actions
step.action: Per over-budget alert: propose retire / threshold / hysteresis / suppression.
step.decision-gate: Default action = retire; non-retire requires justification.

step.name: escalate-chronic-breach
step.action: Escalate to engineering lead with chronic-breach flag.
